summary: Workflow Global Control defaults now link new Dataset and DFM objects to the workflow's default project and path.
details: New workflows prefill Global Control from the user's last project and that project's saved path preference, with the built-in project variable labeled <Default Project>.
Global Control rows auto-save on edit and use a table right-click menu for row add/delete actions.
Global Control table type dropdowns now use in-cell styling and label miscellaneous values as Other.
Workflow Dataset and DFM pages show linked defaults as Default Project and Default Path while using the resolved values for loads and saves.
Project and path pickers opened inside a workflow now include Current Workflow shortcuts sourced from Global Control values.
Shared project and path picker windows now use ArcRho's app-wide scrollbar styling.
The workflow sidebar title now includes a pencil button for renaming the workflow.
Workflow steps can now be grouped into draggable folders with up to three nested folder levels.
